subcodes.first_line: The Book revealed by the All-Merciful unto them that dwell in the realm of possibility, whereby all are summoned unto the Most Exalted Horizon and the Summit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان و به دعا الکل الی الافق الاعلی و الذروه
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
